summary: An execution board led by one control anchor, with owner or dependency clusters and a lighter sequencing strip.
composition_pattern: execution control anchor with owner/dependency clusters and a narrow timeline or sequencing support strip
when_to_use: The page must show how execution is controlled, not just when things happen.
Ownership and dependencies are central to implementation success.
avoid_when: The page is primarily a clean phased rollout with minimal coordination complexity.
